hd5121ed2gc3c8g4381gbaf5g3c1b9ee2c015: Lae'zel - you still live! May the Queen's favour be yours.
h5acad2c0gd25dg401egb7c6g6d0b9c99e2db: Losiir. I see you've earned your robes.
hfe62ea95g65c7g4262g879bg73d801d662e2: *Your head throbs and your skin tingles. Visions rush past: a dragon's wing, a silver sword - and a flash of your face seen through the gith woman's eyes.*

h2fe8311age5dfg4793gb667g35bd706233a5: No - forget it. We must fight together. There are imps blocking our path.
h5fff9c60g0b5dg4d4dg812fg29f58be4d44a: Let us reach the helm and take control.
h8ea97ad0gf484g4596g8a79g57f88d448a54: This ship's navigation system. We must travel the planes - leave Avernus. That is, if you wish to leave, tiefling.
h06295733gd574g4bffg9bf1g7a9075d2238c: This ship's navigation system. We must travel the planes - leave Avernus, before these imps tear us apart.
hc829c769g331eg44cegb319gad585a8f0c67: Let us see what a soldier of Crèche K'liir can do.
h4fe31522gd8cfg4d7aga5a9g48670fffc8a5: You'd do well to follow me.

h6d44ef97g9b90g4f3ega05cga96b9b34ab40: This is Avernus. First layer of the Nine Hells. Pray it is the only you will ever see.
